snippet: Hi Denys, 🌿 50 % off TurboScribe annual plans! Just a reminder: take 50 % off TurboScribe Unlimited annual plans. That's 10 $ per month (120 $ billed annually). Save 50 % with Annual Billing
subject: 🌿 REMINDER: 50 % off TurboScribe annual plans — Spring Savings
body:
Hi Denys,

🌿 50 % off TurboScribe annual plans!

Just a reminder: take 50 % off TurboScribe Unlimited annual plans. That's 10 $ per month (120 $ billed annually).

Save 50 % with Annual Billing

TurboScribe transcribes audio and video files into accurate transcripts and subtitles in seconds. Just upload your audio and video files, then download transcripts in common formats like DOCX, PDF, TXT, or SRT subtitles.

TurboScribe Unlimited includes:

  • ♾️ Unlimited Transcriptions: Unlimited transcriptions. Unlimited minutes.
  • 🤯 10 Hour Uploads: Each file can be up to 10 hours long / 5GB. Upload up to 50 files at a time.
  • 🐋 All Features: Translation to 134+ languages. All transcription modes. Bulk exports. Unlimited storage.
  • ⚡ Highest Priority: We'll always transcribe your files ASAP with the highest priority.

To activate the discount, click Go Unlimited on your dashboard and select Save 120 $ with annual billing at checkout.

Annual plans renew at the discounted rate, so it's a great way to lock in long-term savings this spring.

Save 50 % with Annual Billing

As always, TurboScribe is free up to 3 files per day (30 minutes per file). Visit turboscribe.ai to start transcribing for free.

Happy transcribing! 😊

--
Leif Foged
leif@turboscribe.ai
TurboScribe - Unlimited audio & video transcription
